items.title: Superhuman acquires AI detection startup GPTZero
items.summary: Superhuman, which also has an AI detection tool as part of Grammarly, has snapped up GPTZero.

items.title: JustAI Inks $17M Series A Round
items.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, CA, JustAI, an AI-native marketing platform helping companies automate personalization, experimentation and decisioning at scale, today announced it has raised $17 million in Series A funding.
